nilHMM 0.1.0

    • Full-sib families with the fsfhap caller
  • Changelog

Top-level ancestry-calling API (decode + segment)

Source: R/engine.R
call_ancestry.Rd

Convenience wrapper that chains the two stages: coordinate-free decode (call_states()) followed by coordinate reinstatement (to_segments()). call_ancestry(...) is exactly to_segments(call_states(...)). See call_states() for the full argument list.

Usage

call_ancestry(data, ...)

Arguments

data, ...

Passed to call_states().

Value

data.frame in the common schema (source, donor, name, chr, start_bp, end_bp, state).

Examples

toy <- data.frame(name = "NIL1", chr = 1L, pos = (1:6) * 1e5L,
                  n_ref = c(9, 8, 4, 5, 9, 8), n_alt = c(0, 0, 4, 5, 0, 0))
call_ancestry(toy, caller = "nnil", design = "BC2S2", rrate = 1e-4, err = 0.01)
#>   source donor name chr start_bp end_bp state
#> 1 nilHMM  <NA> NIL1   1   100000 600000     0
